examples: Dream of lawyers more concerned about justice than a judgeship.
But God's righteous judgeship is seen in the punishment of the lawbreaker as well as in the deliverance of the justified.
Chairez was appointed by the governor to a vacant district court judgeship in 1994.
If confirmed, he will be just the third South Asian named to any federal judgeship.
Whoever helped brief the governor on world matters deserves at least a federal judgeship.
